title: Polestar Automotive PSNY Current Analyst Ratings Assessment
text: Polestar Automotive PSNY analyst ratings show consensus rating of Neutral with consensus price target of $4.09 based on 9 analysts. Current stock price at $21.85 compared to highest target of $15.00 from Barclays on January 23, 2026 and lowest of $0.78 from Bernstein on August 30, 2024. Implied downside is negative 70.63% from recent analyst average. Most recent ratings include Cantor Fitzgerald downgrading from Neutral to Underweight with $0.00 price target on February 19, 2026; Barclays maintaining Underweight and raising target from $1 to $15 on January 23, 2026; and B of A Securities initiating with Neutral rating and $1.25 target on December 5, 2024. Analyst sentiment shows significant divergence with some maintaining bullish positions while others recently downgraded stock. Wide range between price targets reflects substantial disagreement about company's valuation and prospects. Key concerns include reduced delivery expectations with guidance lowered to low double-digit growth from previous 30-35% compound annual targets, projected 16% cut to 2026 revenue estimates, additional capital needs, and unclear autonomy strategy.
